intended_use: The LumiNE US software is intended for the visualization of medical images to provide insights in anatomy and pathology in preparation of surgical treatment. As such, the software allows for the conve
intended_use_full: The LumiNE US software is intended for the visualization of medical images to provide insights in anatomy and pathology in preparation of surgical treatment. As such, the software allows for the conversion of 2D patient imaging into 3D models and for the visualization of 2D and 3D patient imaging including Augmented Reality. When accessing the LumiNE US software from a wireless Head-Mounted Display (HMD) or PC monitor, images viewed are for informational purposes only and not intended for diagnostic use.
target_condition: Known intracranial lesions diagnosed as Glioblastoma, Meningioma, or Metastasis requiring surgical treatment
ground_truth: Manual segmentation truthed by 3 U.S.-based neuroradiologists with relevant fellowship experience; ground truth established by mutual agreement after internal discussion and signed off per scan per truther
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) for brain: median 0.96 (95% CI 0.95-0.97); for skin: median 0.99 (95% CI 0.99-1.0); for tumor: median 0.93 (95% CI 0.92-0.94); for ventricles: median 0.89 (95% CI 0.85-0.91). 95% Hausdorff Distance (95% HD) for brain: median 5.88 mm (95% CI 4.75-8.39); for skin: median 3.36 mm (95% CI 0.99-5.51); for tumor: median 2.85 mm (95% CI 1.82-4.12); for ventricles: median 1.93 mm (95% CI 1.70-2.92).
